note: Surface triage for EigenLayer RewardsCoordinator (v1.12.0 impl 0xa0673c53...3c26). User/operator permission + claim surface (setClaimerFor = permission-grant; operator split config; processClaim). The many create*RewardsSubmission functions are AVS/admin-side reward funding (exclude). No EIP-712 typehashes — setClaimerFor is on-chain only; signed_structs empty.

0xa0169ddd.name: setClaimerFor(address)
0xa0169ddd.reason: PERMISSION-GRANT — earner designates a claimer allowed to call processClaim and receive their rewards (address claimer). Delegates reward-claim authority over the caller's earnings. Dambi permission primitive; never exclude.

0xf22cef85.name: setClaimerFor(address,address)
0xf22cef85.reason: PERMISSION-GRANT — set claimer on behalf of an earner (address earner, address claimer); callable by the earner or its PermissionController appointee. Same delegation of reward-claim authority; cover.

0xdcbb03b3.name: setOperatorAVSSplit
0xdcbb03b3.reason: DEFERRED to operator-AVS round — setOperatorAVSSplit is operator fee config for a specific AVS; operator-AVS persona. Out of round-1 delegation+permission scope.

0xb3dbb0e0.name: setOperatorPISplit
0xb3dbb0e0.reason: DEFERRED to operator-AVS round — setOperatorPISplit operator fee config (Programmatic Incentives). Operator-economic, out of round-1 scope.

0xf74e8eac.name: setOperatorSetSplit
0xf74e8eac.reason: DEFERRED to operator-AVS round — setOperatorSetSplit operator fee config for an operator set. Operator-economic, out of round-1 scope.

0x3ccc861d.name: processClaim
0x3ccc861d.reason: DEFERRED — processClaim is a Merkle-proof reward claim (RewardsMerkleClaim struct: tokenLeaves + proofs). Complex proof shape; deferred to a rewards-claim round. Round-1 covers setClaimerFor (the permission grant) only.

0x4596021c.name: processClaims
0x4596021c.reason: DEFERRED — processClaims batch Merkle-proof reward claim (RewardsMerkleClaim[]). Same complex proof shape; deferred with processClaim.

0xfce36c7d.name: createAVSRewardsSubmission
0xfce36c7d.reason: AVS funding — AVS deposits reward tokens to distribute to its operators/stakers (RewardsSubmission[]). Caller is the AVS funding rewards, not a staker/operator claiming. Exclude (AVS-side fund deposit).

0x7282a352.name: createEigenDARewardsSubmission
0x7282a352.reason: AVS funding — EigenDA-specific reward submission. AVS-side.

0x9cb9a5fa.name: createOperatorDirectedAVSRewardsSubmission
0x9cb9a5fa.reason: AVS funding — operator-directed AVS reward submission. AVS-side.

0x0ca29899.name: createOperatorDirectedOperatorSetRewardsSubmission
0x0ca29899.reason: AVS funding — operator-directed operator-set reward submission. AVS-side.

0xff9f6cce.name: createRewardsForAllEarners
0xff9f6cce.reason: admin funding — onlyRewardsForAllSubmitter; rewards for all earners. Admin/whitelisted submitter.

0x8cb0ae1b.name: createTotalStakeRewardsSubmission
0x8cb0ae1b.reason: AVS/admin funding — total-stake reward submission. AVS/admin-side.

0x7ae30583.name: createUniqueStakeRewardsSubmission
0x7ae30583.reason: AVS/admin funding — unique-stake reward submission. AVS/admin-side.

0x3efe1db6.name: submitRoot
0x3efe1db6.reason: infra/onlyRewardsUpdater — submit a new distribution Merkle root. Keeper/updater role, not user.

0xf96abf2e.name: disableRoot
0xf96abf2e.reason: governance/onlyRewardsUpdater — disable a bad root. Admin/keeper.

0x58baaa3e.name: setActivationDelay
0x58baaa3e.reason: governance — onlyOwner; set root activation delay.

0xa50a1d9c.name: setDefaultOperatorSplit
0xa50a1d9c.reason: governance — onlyOwner; set protocol default operator split.

0xe74b981b.name: setFeeRecipient
0xe74b981b.reason: governance — onlyOwner; set protocol fee recipient.

0x8d424f49.name: setOptInForProtocolFee
0x8d424f49.reason: AVS/admin config — opt an AVS in/out of protocol fee (address, bool). AVS-admin side, not staker/operator pre-sign.

0x0eb38345.name: setRewardsForAllSubmitter
0x0eb38345.reason: governance — onlyOwner; whitelist a rewards-for-all submitter.

0x863cb9a9.name: setRewardsUpdater
0x863cb9a9.reason: governance — onlyOwner; set the rewards-updater role.
